title: BrickThrower
description: Brick Thrower - a simple Minecraft plugin that allows players to throw bricks as projectiles. When a brick hits a player, it inflicts customizable damage. Bricks can also destroy various types of glass.
body:
## **Features:**

- Throw bricks as projectiles by right-clicking while holding a brick in your hand
- Customizable damage for brick projectiles _(/setbrikdamage)_
- Destruction of all types of glass and decorated pots on impact (except tinted glass)
- Plays sound effects when a brick hits a player or destroys a block
 
## **Usage:**

To use the plugin, simply hold a brick in your hand and right-click to throw it.
Administrators can use the command /setbrikdamage to set the damage amount for brick projectiles. This command requires the admin.permission.


   > ![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLx8lH46/images/9f8c295e97b2d836b7b75d8dc2e57ef588c39f0c.gif)
